autoRefresh.label: Auto refresh
autoRefresh.body: Keep this page up to date while you work, then pause when you want a quieter view.

profileNudge.body: Identify yourself and the network starts building your frequency profile — a living map of what resonates with you. You will see which creators align with your path, discover concepts you have not found yet, and when you contribute your own work, CC flows back to everyone who shaped your understanding.
profileNudge.footer: Reading is always free. Your profile is yours to build.

vision.resonantAssetsIntro: Each expression is a unique contribution. The most resonant rises to the surface.
vision.needsNativeVoice: Needs a native voice — propose a better translation
vision.pendingTranslation: No view in this language yet — showing the anchor view
vision.staleAwaitingReattunement: Anchor view has moved — this view awaits re-attunement
vision.voicesLede: How this concept lives in practice, told by those living it.
vision.voicesEmpty: No voice has spoken yet. Yours would be the first — a gift to whoever reads next.
vision.voicesAuthorPlaceholder: Your name or community (e.g. Ana from Ubud)
vision.voicesBodyPlaceholder: How do you live this? What have you seen? Two sentences is enough.
vision.voicesThankYou: Thank you — your voice is here.
vision.voiceRipen: Lift this voice into a proposal

notifications.heading: Spoken back to you
notifications.empty: Nothing new. Come back after you've offered a voice.

visionJoin.metaTitle: Join the Vision — The Living Collective
visionJoin.metaDescription: The field is forming. Express your interest, share what you bring, find others who resonate. Privacy-first — you choose what's visible.
visionJoin.heroLede: The Living Collective is not a finished design. It's a frequency pattern — a seed that grows differently in every soil. What you're reading is an open invitation to co-create what wants to emerge.
visionJoin.pathExploreBody: Walk through the 51 concepts. Read the descriptions, the living examples, the aligned places. Feel which ones resonate with you.
visionJoin.pathJoinBody: Express your interest. Share what you bring — skills, materials, ideas, land, energy, heart. Find others who resonate.
visionJoin.pathGatherBody: Browse the community directory. See who else feels the field. Everyone here has chosen to be visible — consent first, always.
visionJoin.callingHeading: What the field is calling for
visionJoin.registerLede: The field doesn't ask for credentials. It senses resonance. Share what feels right. Your email is never exposed — everything else is your choice.
visionJoin.footerLine1: The Coherence Network is the crystalline nervous system for the emerging network of living fields.
visionJoin.footerLine2: It is alive. It changes. It grows. It radiates.

interestForm.thanksBody: Your resonance has been registered. You are now part of the forming field.
interestForm.thanksUpdates: We'll keep you in the flow as things emerge.
interestForm.localeHint: We'll reach you in this language. You can change it any time from the top of the page.
interestForm.placeholderLocation: City, region, or just the continent
interestForm.labelOffering: How do you want to contribute?
interestForm.placeholderOffering: Time, land, resources, specific skills, funding, simply holding space... anything that feels right
interestForm.placeholderMessage: What draws you? What do you feel? What do you envision?
interestForm.privacyLede: Your email is never shared. Everything else is opt-in. Choose what you're comfortable sharing with other people who are also gathering.
interestForm.consentShareName: Show my name to other interested people
interestForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.headline: Who would love this?
invite.lede: Share a direct link to a concept that moved you. They arrive at a full-screen first meeting, not a wall of text.
invite.title: Come meet this
invite.message: I found something that feels alive. Take three minutes and see.
invite.messageWithName: {name} found something that feels alive. Take three minutes and see.
invite.messageWithBoth: {name} thought of you, {recipient}. Something alive is waiting — take three minutes and see.
invite.recipientHint: They arrive already greeted by name — nothing to register, nothing to remember.
invite.langHint: By default, her phone picks the language. Override here if you know her better than her browser settings do.

inviteBanner.welcomeNamedFrom: Welcome, {name} — {from} invited you to meet this.
inviteBanner.welcomeBackNamed: {name}, welcome back. Here's what's stirring for you.

morningNudge.heading: {name}, since you were last here:
morningNudge.voicesOne: 1 new voice on a concept you touched
morningNudge.voicesMany: {count} new voices on concepts you touched

welcome.headline: A living network where ideas become real.
welcome.lede: Meet one concept. Offer a small gesture of care. If something resonates, share your voice — and the collective begins to feel you. Three minutes is enough to see what this is.

feed.empty: The feed is quiet. Be the first breath.

feed.personalEmpty: Your corner is waiting. Offer a voice on something alive and it will gather here.

here.waitingLede: Any one of these would welcome a reader. Tap to begin.

propose.heading: Propose
propose.lede: Offer something for the collective to meet. Your proposal enters the walk right away; reactions become the vote.
propose.bodyPlaceholder: A few sentences. What changes? Why now?
propose.thanks: Your proposal is in the walk.

proposalOrigin.lede: This idea was born from a proposal the collective lifted.

proposal.readyToLift: The voices resonate. This proposal is ready to become an idea.

meeting.inviteHint: Your gesture raised both pulses. Join so your name walks with it

reactions.inviteContributorLede: Your loving gesture is here. Become a contributor so your name stands with this part of the vision as a whole —

join.title: Join the Network
join.lede: Three steps. One minute. You receive a cryptographic identity that is yours forever — not owned by a platform, not stored in a database you cannot see. Your public key is your proof. Your reading builds your frequency profile. When you contribute, CC flows.
join.step1Body: Your identity is an Ed25519 cryptographic keypair. The public key is your address in the network. The private key stays with you — it proves you are who you say you are.
join.step1Footnote: Bring your own Ed25519 key, or connect your existing EVM wallet (MetaMask, Rainbow, etc.) for on-chain CC sensing. Your keys never leave your control.
join.step2ShownOnce: This is shown once. Save it now.
join.step2Confirm: I have saved my private key somewhere safe
join.step2WalletBody: Connect your EVM wallet. Your wallet address becomes your contributor identity. CC earned on-chain settles directly to this address. Full self-custody — we never hold your keys.
join.step2WalletHelp1: Paste your wallet address, or connect via WalletConnect (coming soon).
join.step2WalletHelp2: This address will be used for Story Protocol IP registration, x402 micropayments, and USDC settlement.
join.step2BringBody: Paste your Ed25519 public key (hex encoded, 64 characters). Your private key never touches this server.
join.step3Body: This is how you appear in the network. Lowercase, hyphens allowed.
join.step4Point1: Your reads on this site are now sensed with your contributor ID — building your frequency profile
join.step4Point2: NFT assets will suggest you identify yourself for sensing — because every sensed view flows CC to the creator
join.step4Point3: When you contribute (an article, a blueprint, a hosted node), you start generating CC
join.step4Point4: Your reading history shapes where your CC flows — to the creators who resonated with you
join.step4VerifyHint: Your public key is verifiable at:

ideaSubmit.seeOthers: or see what others are working on

resonance.title: Resonance
resonance.lede: This is the heartbeat of the network. Every question asked, every spec written, every contribution — it shows up here.
resonance.newsFeedLede: Latest headlines from across the network's sources.
resonance.quiet: The network is quiet right now. Be the first to share an idea.
resonance.noRecent: No recent resonance activity. Here are the most active ideas:

messageForm.selectNode: Select a node to view messages

specs.title: Specification Map
specs.lede: Specs are the delivery contracts between ideas, implementation work, and verification. This view shows what the repo can currently discover, what the registry knows, and where the links are still missing.
specs.visibleSub: {n} visible specs from {source} and the registry.
specs.discoveredLineage: Discovered from system lineage. Add registry metadata to make this spec measurable and easier to reason about.
specs.registryMissing: Registry metrics missing. Link this spec in the registry to expose ROI, gap, and summary data.
specs.registryCoverageSub: {n} of {total} visible specs currently have registry metadata attached.

tasks.title: Work That Is Moving
tasks.lede: See what is active, what is blocked, what finished recently, and open one work card when you need to update it.
tasks.showingAll: Showing active and past work cards.

investBalance.enterName: Enter your contributor name to see how many seeds you have.

invest.title: Garden of Ideas
invest.lede: Every idea you nurture grows into real code. Your attention is water — direct it toward the seeds you believe in most.
invest.emptyGarden: The garden is empty. Plant the first seed.
invest.growthSeed: Young and untested — be the first to tend this idea.
invest.growthStrong: This plant has strong roots and is ready to grow fast.
invest.growthSteady: Steady growth — regular tending will help it thrive.
invest.growthNeeds: Needs attention — a little water could unlock real growth.

assets.title: Asset Catalog
assets.lede: Assets are the things people actually touch: code, content, models, and data. This page shows what exists, what it cost, and where contribution history is attached.
assets.linkedHint: Jump from an asset into the contribution ledger to see who shaped it and what it cost.

search.title: Search projects
search.apiError: API error: {error}. Is the API running?

treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.lede: Deposit ETH or BTC into the Coherence Network treasury. Your crypto converts to CC (Coherence Credits) which get staked on the ideas you believe in.
treasury.step1After: to the treasury wallet address shown below.
treasury.step2After: with the blockchain transaction hash so we can verify it.
treasury.step3After: on ideas you believe in — directing real compute toward them.
treasury.step4After: , your share flows back through value lineage — proportional to your contribution.
treasury.footnote: Deposits are recorded on an append-only ledger. The actual crypto transfer happens on-chain; this system records the transaction hash for verification.
treasury.notConfigured: Treasury not configured yet. Check back soon.
treasury.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number.

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.lede: All registered federation nodes — status, capabilities, provider health, and remote messaging.

pipeline.title: What Is Happening Now
pipeline.liveLede: Nodes claiming tasks, providers executing, ideas advancing through stages — the network is alive.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.registerBody: Create your identity in the network so your contributions are sensed and credited.
contribute.selectPairBody: Choose who is proposing changes and who will review them. This determines attribution and vote authority.
contribute.createIdeaBody: Submit a new idea to the network. It starts as a proposal and gets reviewed before going live.
contribute.updateIdeaBody: Adjust values, cost, confidence, or status of an existing idea as new information emerges.
contribute.questionsBody: Ask questions that need answering before an idea can move forward, or provide answers to existing ones.
contribute.specsBody: Create or update a feature specification. Specs define what gets built and link to ideas for context.
contribute.forDevsBody: All the actions above can also be done programmatically — useful for bots, scripts, or AI agents.
contribute.introLede: Every contribution moves the network forward. Register, propose changes, and review what others have submitted. Approved requests apply automatically.
contribute.approvalPolicy: Default policy is one approval required. When contributor volume grows, increase CHANGE_REQUEST_MIN_APPROVALS.
contribute.devListSpecs: List specs: GET /api/spec-registry | list queue: GET /api/governance/change-requests

contributors.title: Contributors
contributors.lede: People and agents contributing to the network.
contributors.registerHintBefore: To register a new contributor and submit changes, use the

ideas.title: Ideas
ideas.lede: Ideas are living things. They start as a thought, attract attention, grow through collaboration, and create real value.
ideas.sectionAllLede: The complete landscape — every idea sensed across the fractal.
ideas.sectionPortfolioLede: Sixteen super-ideas grouped by pillar. Drill into any one to see the absorbed ideas and linked specs.
ideas.empty: No ideas yet. Be the first to share one.
ideas.pillarRealization: Realization — Track every idea from inception to impact
ideas.pillarPipeline: Pipeline — Turn ideas into working software
ideas.pillarEconomics: Economics — CC as unit of account, value flows fairly
ideas.pillarSurfaces: Surfaces — Where users meet the system
ideas.pillarNetwork: Network — How the platform federates and welcomes people

trigger.spec: Task completion moves from backlog to specced.
trigger.test: Task completion moves work into verification.
trigger.review: Task completion pushes to review readiness.

visionIndex.heroLede: What emerges when community is designed from resonance, vitality, and coherence — not from contracts, property, or obligation.
visionIndex.knowsBody: There is no inherent good or bad. There is only what is alive and what is not alive. Sensed through the body.
visionIndex.knowsTail: Both are the field communicating with itself.
visionIndex.knowsCard1Body: The answer is in what's happening now.
visionIndex.knowsCard2Body: The collective body knows before any cell.
visionIndex.knowsCard3Body: What's resonant feels obvious. Like water finding its level.
visionIndex.knowsCard4Body: The field's intelligence exceeds any node's perception.
visionIndex.storiesCta: Walk through the lived experience — stories, scenes, daily rhythm
visionIndex.blueprintsLede: Real open-source plans, live flows, materials, costs, and methods for each aspect of the community. Some pages hold a pure concept. Some hold a living transformation story. They are all part of the same organism.
visionIndex.emergingLede: The anchors are strong enough to begin envisioning form. Each domain is where flows converge into inhabitable, livable expression.
visionIndex.orientationNervous: The Coherence Network is the crystalline nervous system for the emerging network of living fields.
visionIndex.orientationItsAlive: It is alive. It changes. It grows. It radiates.

home.heroLede: A pattern you noticed. A gap that needs filling. A better way. Share it — someone out there is looking for exactly this.
home.howDesc1: Type what you're thinking. No sign-up needed.
home.howDesc2: Others ask questions, write specs, build.
home.howDesc3: Every contribution is recorded. Credit flows to creators.
home.emptyActivity: No recent activity yet. Be the first to share an idea.
home.gentleTap2: You don't need to know everything.
home.gentleTap3: You just need one thought worth sharing.
home.footerTagline: Ideas into realization — through attention, curiosity, and collaboration.
